runTitle: Vercel preview targeted QA - fullscreen analysis basis parity after hydration fix
coveredSurfaces: system-boot to dashboard transition on preview
dashboard warning CTA opens AI sidebar with prefilled prompt
AI sidebar first response renders analysis basis detail with traceId/tool/timeRange
fullscreen AI workspace restores same conversation after sidebar handoff
fullscreen analysis basis detail preserves traceId/tool/timeRange parity

expertAssessments.rationale: Preview deployment on commit 435595b1b preserved traceId, engine, tool, and timeRange metadata across sidebar to fullscreen handoff.
Protected preview was exercised end-to-end with Playwright using Vercel automation bypass, including guest login, dashboard CTA, AI response, and fullscreen workspace restore.

artifacts.label: Fullscreen AI workspace with preserved analysis basis detail

completedImprovements.title: Fullscreen AI workspace should preserve tool-grounded analysis basis metadata
completedImprovements.evidence: Preview commit 435595b1b preserved traceId, Streaming AI + RAG engine label, tool result, and recent 1 hour time range in fullscreen analysis basis detail.

notes: Preview deployment was protected by Vercel Deployment Protection; QA accessed it with the configured automation bypass secret and header-based bypass.
Sidebar analysis basis detail showed traceId 9d1bbc19c77e125a987573d226de57c8, tool 이상 탐지, and period 최근 1시간.
Fullscreen workspace restored the same message and preserved the same traceId, tool summary, engine label Streaming AI + RAG, and 최근 1시간 period.
The prior regression where fullscreen collapsed to 일반 대화 응답 was not reproduced on commit 435595b1b.
